description: Immutable contiguous anomaly event windows produced by DS aggregation helpers.
sql: SELECT CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS fleet_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS pad_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS processing_run_id, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS algorithm_version, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS source_signature, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS event_id, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num_td, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS anomaly, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS anomaly_display, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS start_ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS end_ts, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS duration_sec, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS duration_min, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS created_at FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
